member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ApiException
member.summary: Single source of truth for API exceptions across all Bannou services and SDKs. Used by all generated clients and service models.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ApiException.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code of the error response.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ApiException.Response
member.summary: Raw response body content, if available.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ApiException.Headers
member.summary: Response headers from the failed request.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ApiException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String}},System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates a new ApiException with the specified details.
member.param: HTTP status code of the error response.
Raw response body content (optional, defaults to null).
Response headers from the failed request (optional, defaults to empty).
Inner exception that caused this failure (optional).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ApiException`1
member.summary: Generic API exception with typed result for structured error responses.
member.typeparam: Type of the error result payload.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ApiException`1.Result
member.summary: Typed error result from the API response.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ApiException`1.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String}},`0,System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates a new ApiException with a typed result.
member.param: HTTP status code of the error response.
Response headers from the failed request.
Typed error result from the API.
Inner exception that caused this failure.
member.remarks: Parameter order maintained for backwards compatibility with generated clients. For the non-generic ApiException, use the simplified constructor with optional parameters.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson
member.summary:
Static helper for JSON serialization/deserialization that always uses Bannou's standard configuration. This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for JSON serialization settings across all Bannou services and SDKs.
USE THIS INSTEAD OF JsonSerializer.Deserialize/Serialize DIRECTLY.
This ensures consistent behavior across the codebase: - Case-insensitive property matching (handles both PascalCase and camelCase) - Enums serialize as strings matching C# enum names (e.g., "GettingStarted") - Null values are ignored when writing - Strict number handling (no string-to-number coercion) - Proper handling of all Bannou model types
Example usage: var model = BannouJson.Deserialize<MyModel>(jsonString); var json = BannouJson.Serialize(model);

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.Options
member.summary: Standard JSON serializer options used throughout Bannou. This is the canonical configuration - all JSON operations should use this.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.Deserialize``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserialize JSON string to object using Bannou's standard configuration.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.DeserializeRequired``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserialize JSON string to object using Bannou's standard configuration. Throws if result is null.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.Serialize``1(``0)
member.summary: Serialize object to JSON string using Bannou's standard configuration.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.Serialize(System.Object,System.Type)
member.summary: Serialize object to JSON string using Bannou's standard configuration with explicit type.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.Deserialize(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Deserialize JSON string to object of a runtime type using Bannou's standard configuration. Use this when the type is only known at runtime (e.g., event dispatch).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.Deserialize``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Deserialize from UTF-8 bytes using Bannou's standard configuration.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.SerializeToUtf8Bytes``1(``0)
member.summary: Serialize object to UTF-8 bytes using Bannou's standard configuration.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.DeserializeAsync``1(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Async deserialize from stream using Bannou's standard configuration.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.SerializeAsync``1(System.IO.Stream,``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Async serialize to stream using Bannou's standard configuration.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.SerializeToElement``1(``0)
member.summary: Serialize object to JsonElement using Bannou's standard configuration.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJson.ApplyBannouSettings(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Apply Bannou's standard JSON serializer settings to an existing options object. Use this when configuring external libraries (MassTransit, etc.) that provide their own options.
member.returns: The configured options object for fluent chaining

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJsonExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for JSON serialization using Bannou's standard configuration. Provides a fluent API for common JSON operations.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJsonExtensions.FromJson``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserialize this JSON string using Bannou's standard configuration.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BannouJsonExtensions.ToJson``1(``0)
member.summary: Serialize this object to JSON using Bannou's standard configuration.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BaseClientEvent
member.summary: Base class for all server-to-client push events delivered via WebSocket. All client events MUST inherit from this class and include these fields. The eventName field is used for whitelist validation in Connect service.

remarks.para: This class is the single source of truth for base client event properties. All derived events generated via NSwag will inherit from this class.
Implements IBannouEvent for uniform event handling in message taps.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BaseClientEvent.EventName
P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BaseClientEvent.EventId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this event instance. Used for deduplication, tracing, and correlation.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BaseClientEvent.Timestamp
member.summary: When the event was generated (ISO 8601 format, UTC).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BaseServiceEvent
member.summary: Base class for all service-to-service events via RabbitMQ pub/sub. All service events MUST inherit from this class and include these fields.

remarks.para: This class is the single source of truth for base service event properties. All derived events generated via NSwag will inherit from this class.
Implements IBannouEvent for uniform event handling in message taps.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BaseServiceEvent.EventName
member.summary: Unique event type identifier (e.g., "session.connected"). Convention: {service}.{event_name} or {domain}.{event_name}

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BaseServiceEvent.EventId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this event instance (UUID string). Used for deduplication, tracing, and correlation.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.BaseServiceEvent.Timestamp
member.summary: When the event was created (ISO 8601 format, UTC).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.DiscriminatedRecordConverter`1
member.summary: Base JSON converter for discriminated record hierarchies. Reads a string discriminator property from the JSON object, maps it to a concrete sealed record type, and deserializes accordingly. Write serializes the concrete runtime type directly (the discriminator property is included naturally as a record positional parameter).

remarks.para: Subclass this converter and pass the discriminator property name and type map to the base constructor. Apply [JsonConverter(typeof(YourConverter))] on the abstract record base type.
The discriminator property is matched case-insensitively during deserialization, consistent with . Discriminator values are matched exactly (case-sensitive) since they are machine identifiers.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.DiscriminatedRecordConverter`1.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Type})
member.summary: Initializes the converter with a discriminator property name and a mapping from discriminator string values to concrete types.
member.param: The JSON property name used as the type discriminator (e.g., "type"). Matched case-insensitively during deserialization.
Maps discriminator values to their corresponding concrete types. All mapped types must be assignable to .
member.exception: Thrown when any mapped type is not assignable to .

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.DiscriminatedRecordConverter`1.FindDiscriminator(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Scans the JSON object for the discriminator property (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.DiscriminatedRecordConverter`1.GetOptionsWithoutSelf(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Returns a copy of the given options with this converter removed to prevent infinite recursion. Cached per options instance (typically one: BannouJson.Options).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.IBannouEvent
member.summary: Base interface for all Bannou events (both service-to-service and client events). All events in the system implement this interface, enabling uniform handling in message taps and event processing pipelines.

remarks.para: This interface defines the minimal contract for all events: - EventId: Unique identifier for deduplication and tracing - Timestamp: When the event was created - EventName: The type/name of the event

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.IBannouEvent.EventId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this event instance. Used for deduplication, tracing, and correlation.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.IBannouEvent.Timestamp
member.summary: When the event was created (UTC).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.IBannouEvent.EventName
member.summary: The type/name of the event - usually also the topic it's published on.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.IDeprecatableEntity
member.summary: Interface for entities that support the deprecation lifecycle per IMPLEMENTATION TENETS. Implemented by generated lifecycle event classes when the entity's x-lifecycle definition includes deprecation: true.

remarks.para: Two deprecation categories exist (Category A: world-building definitions, Category B: content templates), but both share the same three-field model. The category distinction affects endpoint design (deprecate/undeprecate/delete vs deprecate-only), not the data contract.
Deprecation state changes are published via *.updated events with ChangedFields containing "isDeprecated", "deprecatedAt", and "deprecationReason" — not via dedicated deprecation events.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.IDeprecatableEntity.IsDeprecated
member.summary: Whether this entity is deprecated. Deprecated entities should not be used for new instance creation.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.IDeprecatableEntity.DeprecatedAt
member.summary: When the entity was deprecated. Null if not deprecated.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.IDeprecatableEntity.DeprecationReason
member.summary: Reason for deprecation. Null if not deprecated or no reason provided. Maximum 500 characters.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ILifecycleEvent
member.summary: Base interface for all lifecycle events (created, updated, deleted). Lifecycle events carry the entity's temporal tracking fields that are guaranteed present in every entity's storage model.

remarks.para: Generated lifecycle events (from x-lifecycle in event schemas) implement the appropriate sub-interface automatically. Non-lifecycle events that follow the same patterns (e.g., a manually-defined *.updated event with ChangedFields) can also implement these interfaces for uniform handling.
These interfaces complement (which provides EventId, Timestamp, EventName) by adding entity-level temporal fields that every lifecycle event carries regardless of entity type.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ILifecycleEvent.CreatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the entity was originally created. Always present — every entity tracks its creation time.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ILifecycleEvent.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the entity was last updated. Set to CreatedAt on creation (entity was "last touched" at birth).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ILifecycleCreatedEvent
member.summary: Interface for lifecycle created events. Implemented by all generated *CreatedEvent classes.
member.remarks: Created events carry the full entity snapshot at creation time. The entity-specific fields (e.g., AccountId, CharacterId) vary per entity and are not part of this interface.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ILifecycleUpdatedEvent
member.summary: Interface for lifecycle updated events. Implemented by all generated *UpdatedEvent classes.

remarks.para: Updated events carry the full entity snapshot after mutation plus a manifest of which fields changed, enabling consumers to filter on relevant changes without diffing the entire payload.
ChangedFields contains camelCase JSON property names matching the event schema (e.g., "displayName", "email"), not C# PascalCase names.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ILifecycleUpdatedEvent.ChangedFields
member.summary: List of field names that were modified in this update. Uses camelCase JSON property names from the event schema.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ILifecycleDeletedEvent
member.summary: Interface for lifecycle deleted events. Implemented by all generated *DeletedEvent classes.
member.remarks: Deleted events carry the full entity snapshot at deletion time plus an optional reason. The reason is particularly useful for merge operations (e.g., "Merged into {targetId}") and audit trails.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ILifecycleDeletedEvent.DeletedReason
member.summary: Optional reason for deletion (e.g., "Merged into {targetId}", "User requested"). Null when no specific reason was provided.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3
member.summary: Engine-agnostic 3D floating-point vector shared across Bannou SDKs.

remarks.para: A 12-byte value type (three floats). Single-precision to match graphics-pipeline conventions used by sprite-theory, bridges (Stride, Godot, Unity), and GPU math. The scene-composer SDK defines its own SceneComposer.Math.Vector3 with double precision for large-world accuracy — that is a separate type and does not conflict with this one.

Equality is exact (bit-pattern) rather than epsilon-based so the type is usable as a dictionary key and satisfies the Equals/GetHashCode contract. Callers that need tolerance-based comparisons should compute per-component differences explicitly.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Zero
member.summary: Zero vector (0, 0, 0).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.One
member.summary: Unit vector (1, 1, 1) — all components set to one.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.UnitX
member.summary: Unit X axis (1, 0, 0).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.UnitY
member.summary: Unit Y axis (0, 1, 0).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.UnitZ
member.summary: Unit Z axis (0, 0, 1).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.X
member.summary: X component.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Y
member.summary: Y component.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Z
member.summary: Z component.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.#ctor(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a 3D vector from its three floating-point components.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.LengthSquared
member.summary: Squared length of the vector. Prefer this over for comparison operations — it avoids the square root.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Length
member.summary: Euclidean length of the vector.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Normalized
member.summary: Returns a unit-length copy of the vector, or when the vector is too small to normalize without producing NaN/Inf.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.op_Addition(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Component-wise addition.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.op_Subtraction(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Component-wise subtraction.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.op_Multiply(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,System.Single)
member.summary: Scalar multiplication.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.op_Multiply(System.Single,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Scalar multiplication (scalar first).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.op_Division(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,System.Single)
member.summary: Scalar division.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.op_UnaryNegation(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Unary negation.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Dot(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Dot product of two vectors.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Cross(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Cross product of two vectors.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Lerp(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,System.Single)
member.summary: Linear interpolation between (at t = 0) and (at t = 1). The parameter is not clamped — callers may extrapolate beyond the [0, 1] range.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Distance(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Euclidean distance between two points.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Min(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Component-wise minimum of two vectors.
member.returns: Vector whose components are the smaller of the two inputs.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Max(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Component-wise maximum of two vectors.
member.returns: Vector whose components are the larger of the two inputs.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.op_Equality(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Exact equality operator.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.op_Inequality(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Exact inequality operator.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.Math.Vector3.Deconstruct(System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@)
member.summary: Deconstructs the vector into its three components for pattern matching and tuple-style destructuring.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApi
member.summary: Definition of a prebound API call. Decoupled from generated contract models for use across services.
member.remarks: This model is used by ServiceNavigator.ExecutePreboundApiAsync to define what service/endpoint to call and what payload template to use.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApi.ServiceName
member.summary: Target service name (e.g., "currency", "inventory", "character").

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApi.Endpoint
member.summary: Target endpoint path (e.g., "/currency/transfer", "/inventory/add").

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApi.PayloadTemplate
member.summary: JSON payload template with {{variable}} placeholders. Variables are substituted from the context dictionary at execution time.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApi.Description
member.summary: Human-readable description of what this API call does.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApi.ExecutionMode
member.summary: How to execute this API call.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApi.ResponseTransformation
member.summary: Optional transformation rules for the API response. When set, the raw response is evaluated against these rules to produce a transformed result (potentially different status code and payload). When null, the raw response passes through unchanged.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApiExecutionMode
member.summary: How a prebound API should be executed.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApiExecutionMode.Sync
member.summary: Execute synchronously and wait for response.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApiExecutionMode.Async
member.summary: Execute asynchronously but still track completion.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.PreboundApiExecutionMode.FireAndForget
member.summary: Execute and don't wait or track - fire and forget.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformation
member.summary: Transformation rules applied to a prebound API response. The transformer evaluates rules in order; the first matching rule produces the result (status code + payload). If no rules match, the raw response passes through unchanged.

remarks.para: This replaces simple pass/fail validation with a conditional transformer model: the prebound API creator defines what "success" and "failure" mean in their context, and can produce entirely different payloads based on what the response contains.
Transient failure detection (transport-level retryable errors) runs before any rules.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformation.Rules
member.summary: Ordered list of transformation rules. First matching rule wins. Each rule specifies conditions (AND logic) and the result to produce when matched.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformation.TransientFailureStatusCodes
member.summary: HTTP status codes indicating transient failure (retryable at transport level). Checked before any rules are evaluated. Default when null or empty: 408, 429, 502, 503, 504.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationRule
member.summary: A single transformation rule: when all conditions match, produce this result.
member.remarks: The payload field allows the prebound API creator to specify exactly what the consuming system receives. For example, a species check might return different modifier payloads depending on which species the response contains, without the consumer needing to understand species mechanics.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationRule.Conditions
member.summary: All conditions must match for this rule to fire (AND logic). An empty or null conditions list always matches (unconditional rule).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationRule.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code to return when this rule matches.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationRule.Payload
member.summary: JSON payload to return when this rule matches. Null means pass through the raw response body unchanged.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationRule.Description
member.summary: Human-readable description of what this rule does (for diagnostics/logging).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationCondition
member.summary: A single condition to evaluate against an API response. Used within transformation rules to match on status codes, JSON paths, and values.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationCondition.Type
member.summary: The type of condition to evaluate.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationCondition.JsonPath
member.summary: JsonPath expression to extract a value from the response body. Required for all JsonPath* condition types. Uses simplified dot notation (e.g., "$.balance", "$.species.code", "$.items[0].name").

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationCondition.ExpectedValue
member.summary: Expected value for comparison conditions. Type coercion applied: "true"/"false" for booleans, numeric strings for numbers.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationCondition.Operator
member.summary: Comparison operator for numeric comparisons (JsonPathGreaterThan/LessThan).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationCondition.StatusCodes
member.summary: HTTP status codes for the StatusCodeIn condition type.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationConditionType
member.summary: Types of conditions that can be evaluated against an API response.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationConditionType.StatusCodeIn
member.summary: Response status code is in the specified list.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationConditionType.JsonPathEquals
member.summary: JSON path value equals the expected value (case-insensitive).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationConditionType.JsonPathNotEquals
member.summary: JSON path value does not equal the expected value (case-insensitive).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationConditionType.JsonPathExists
member.summary: JSON path exists in the response body.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationConditionType.JsonPathNotExists
member.summary: JSON path does not exist in the response body.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationConditionType.JsonPathGreaterThan
member.summary: JSON path numeric value is greater than the expected value.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationConditionType.JsonPathLessThan
member.summary: JSON path numeric value is less than the expected value.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationConditionType.JsonPathContains
member.summary: JSON path string value contains the expected value (case-insensitive).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ComparisonOperator
member.summary: Comparison operators for numeric conditions.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ComparisonOperator.Eq
member.summary: Equal to.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ComparisonOperator.Ne
member.summary: Not equal to.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ComparisonOperator.Gt
member.summary: Greater than.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ComparisonOperator.Gte
member.summary: Greater than or equal to.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ComparisonOperator.Lt
member.summary: Less than.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ComparisonOperator.Lte
member.summary: Less than or equal to.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationOutcome
member.summary: What happened during response transformation.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationOutcome.PassThrough
member.summary: No transformation rules configured, or no rules matched. StatusCode and Payload are from the raw API response.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationOutcome.Transformed
member.summary: A transformation rule matched. StatusCode and Payload are from the rule.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationOutcome.TransientFailure
member.summary: The raw response status code was in the transient failure set. The caller should retry. Payload is null.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationResult
member.summary: Result of applying response transformation rules to a raw API response. Always contains a final StatusCode. Payload may be the raw response, a rule-defined payload, or null (transient failure).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationResult.StatusCode
member.summary: The final HTTP status code (from the raw response or the matched rule).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationResult.Payload
member.summary: The final payload. May be: - The raw response body (pass-through or rule with null payload) - A rule-defined payload (transformed) - Null (transient failure or empty raw response)

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationResult.Outcome
member.summary: What happened during transformation.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationResult.MatchedRuleDescription
member.summary: Description of the matched rule, if any. For diagnostics/logging.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationResult.IsSuccess
member.summary: Whether the final status code indicates success (2xx).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformer
member.summary: Pure-computation engine that transforms a raw API response into a final result based on declarative transformation rules.

remarks.para: No dependencies, no state, no DI — this is a static utility that takes inputs and produces outputs. The transformation rules are defined by the prebound API creator who knows both what the API returns and what the consumer needs.
Evaluation order: 1. Check transient failure status codes (transport-level, before rules) 2. Evaluate rules in order (first match wins) 3. If no rules match, pass through the raw response

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformer.DefaultTransientStatusCodes
member.summary: Default HTTP status codes treated as transient (retryable) failures.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformer.Transform(System.Int32,System.String,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformation)
member.summary: Transforms a raw API response using the given transformation rules.
member.param: HTTP status code from the raw API response.
Response body from the raw API response (may be null).
Transformation rules to apply. Null = pass through.
member.returns: The transformation result with final status code, payload, and outcome.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformer.AllConditionsMatch(System.Int32,System.Text.Json.JsonDocument,System.Collections.Generic.List{BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationCondition})
member.summary: Evaluates whether all conditions in a rule match the given response. An empty or null conditions list always matches (unconditional rule).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformer.EvaluateCondition(System.Int32,System.Text.Json.JsonDocument,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.TransformationCondition)
member.summary: Evaluates a single condition against the response.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformer.GetJsonPathValue(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a value from a JSON document using simplified path notation. Supports: $.property, $.nested.property, $.array[0], $.array[0].property.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformer.ParsePathSegments(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a path string into segments, handling dots and bracket notation.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformer.GetElementStringValue(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Gets the string representation of a JSON element value.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.Core.ResponseTransformer.TryGetNumericValue(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Decimal@)
member.summary: Tries to extract a numeric value from a JSON element.
